title: Spicy Garlic Korean Stir-fry
description: An earthy and dense low-calorie-friendly brunch dish featuring garlic, prepared using the pressure-cooking method for a quick and healthy meal.
instructions: Pressurize the chicken breast with a bit of spicy chili paste and soy sauce for about 5 minutes.
Chop the garlic, bell peppers, and scallions into small pieces.
Heat some oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the chopped vegetables and cook until they start to soften.
Add the pressurized chicken to the pan with its liquid and continue cooking for another 2 minutes.
Stir in the reserved chili paste and soy sauce, ensuring everything is well combined.
